name: connectwunder
description: Official ConnectWunder workspace plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with your ConnectWunder workspace in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect your authenticated ConnectWunder workspace to Codex for people, companies, boards, documents, meetings, activity, and calendar workflows.
defaultPrompt: Summarize recent activity in my ConnectWunder workspace.
Find people and companies related to a deal or project.
Create a board item from our agreed next steps.
Interview me and build a living Brand OS from my existing designs or visual inspiration.
